name: syncrypt
description: Simple, secure, predictable file sync for Obsidian — you own the data.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build -w @syncrypt/obsidian
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/providers/filesystem/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/crypto/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/crypto/test/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/providers/s3/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/sdk/test/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/obsidian-plugin/tsconfig.json
